# Rally Exterior Solutions

> Premium exterior lighting and cleaning for homes and businesses across the Ohio Valley and Wheeling, WV region. Locally owned, fully insured, 4.9-star rated. Free, no-pressure estimates with most quotes back same-day.

Phone: (740) 208-8632
Email: info@rallyexteriorsolutions.com
Website: https://rallyexteriorsolutions.com
Service area: Within ~50 miles of Wheeling, WV / the Ohio Valley — both sides of the Ohio River. Includes Wheeling, St. Clairsville, Bridgeport, Martins Ferry, Bellaire, Moundsville, Wellsburg, Barnesville, Cadiz, Tiltonsville (43963) and surrounding OH/WV towns.
Hours: Mon–Fri 8am–6pm, Sat 9am–4pm.

## Services
- [Permanent Exterior Lighting](https://rallyexteriorsolutions.com/services/permanent-lighting): Architectural-grade, app-controlled LED lighting installed under the eaves — invisible by day, any color at night, year-round.
- [Christmas & Holiday Lighting](https://rallyexteriorsolutions.com/services/holiday-lighting): Full-service design, install, in-season maintenance, takedown and storage with premium commercial-grade bulbs.
- [House Washing](https://rallyexteriorsolutions.com/services/house-washing): Low-pressure soft washing that safely removes mildew, algae and dirt from siding.
- [Roof Washing](https://rallyexteriorsolutions.com/services/roof-washing): Soft-wash removal of black algae streaks, moss and lichen — no high pressure, extends roof life.
- [Concrete Cleaning](https://rallyexteriorsolutions.com/services/concrete-cleaning): Even, streak-free cleaning of driveways, sidewalks, patios and pool decks.
- [Concrete & Paver Sealing](https://rallyexteriorsolutions.com/services/concrete-paver-sealing): Premium sealing that repels stains, locks joint sand and protects against weather.
- [Commercial Exterior Cleaning](https://rallyexteriorsolutions.com/services/commercial-cleaning): Storefronts, plazas, HOAs and facilities — building washing, flatwork and gum removal, scheduled around business hours.

## Key pages
- [Free Lighting Mockup tool](https://rallyexteriorsolutions.com/mockup): Upload a home photo and preview permanent or Christmas lighting.

- [Guides & pricing](https://rallyexteriorsolutions.com/guides)

## Facts
- Methods: industry-preferred low-pressure "soft washing" for siding and roofs (safe, longer-lasting than high-pressure washing).
- Insured: yes; certificate of insurance available for commercial/HOA work.
- Reviews: 4.9-star average on Google.
